description: Curator verdicts for catalog entry descriptions. RTL-P2.399. Scanner honours verdict=good entries by emitting locked_text verbatim, skipping every tier. See routertl/docs/internal/ or RTL-P2.399 backlog for the full design.

analog-devices/ad_tdd_control.locked_text: Time-division duplex controller generating synchronized transmit and receive path switching signals based on frame timing.
analog-devices/ad_tdd_control.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

analog-devices/axi_dmac_reset_manager.locked_text: Cross-domain reset and enable manager for AXI DMA controller request, destination, and source clock domains.
analog-devices/axi_dmac_reset_manager.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

analog-devices/hsci_master_regs_regs.locked_text: Register bank for the HSCI master controller, exposing configuration and status fields over the processor interface.
analog-devices/hsci_master_regs_regs.notes: upstream description was an ASCII register-map dump; rewrote from module role.

analog-devices/hsci_mlink_ctrl.locked_text: High-speed serial link controller coordinating FSM-based link establishment with clock adjustment and alignment.
analog-devices/hsci_mlink_ctrl.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

analog-devices/up_delay_cntrl.locked_text: Configurable delay controller with register-based processor interface for multiple delay channels and DRP readback.
analog-devices/up_delay_cntrl.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

opencores/eth_maccontrol.locked_text: Implements IEEE 802.3x flow control by detecting incoming PAUSE frames and inhibiting transmission for the requested duration.
opencores/eth_maccontrol.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_miim.locked_text: MII Management interface controller driving MDC and MDIO for PHY register read and write transactions.
opencores/eth_miim.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_outputcontrol.locked_text: Coordinates output control signals between the MAC transmit pipeline and the GMII/MII PHY interface, gating transmissions on link state.
opencores/eth_outputcontrol.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_receivecontrol.locked_text: Manages receive-side flow control by signalling pause requests upstream when the RX FIFO threshold is crossed.
opencores/eth_receivecontrol.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_rxstatem.locked_text: Receive-path state machine coordinating preamble detection, frame data capture, and end-of-frame signalling.
opencores/eth_rxstatem.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_shiftreg.locked_text: Parameterized shift register used to serialise and deserialise data within the MAC pipeline.
opencores/eth_shiftreg.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_transmitcontrol.locked_text: Manages transmit-side coordination including collision detection responses, deferral, and retransmit triggering.
opencores/eth_transmitcontrol.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_txstatem.locked_text: Transmit-path state machine sequencing preamble emission, frame data, and inter-packet gap timing.
opencores/eth_txstatem.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/MAC_tx_addr_add.locked_text: Inserts the configured source MAC address into outgoing transmit frames before the FCS calculation pipeline.
opencores/MAC_tx_addr_add.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/usbHostControl.locked_text: USB host-side state machine coordinating control transfers, bulk transfers, and device enumeration with the serial interface engine.
opencores/usbHostControl.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/usbSlaveControl.locked_text: USB device-side control logic handling SETUP token responses, endpoint state, and host control transfer phases.
opencores/usbSlaveControl.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/usbSerialInterfaceEngine.locked_text: USB Serial Interface Engine performing NRZI encoding, bit-stuffing, and PID/CRC generation for the bus-level protocol.
opencores/usbSerialInterfaceEngine.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/hostcontroller.locked_text: USB host controller top-level integrating the SIE, host control state machine, and packet buffer interface.
opencores/hostcontroller.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/EP1Mouse.locked_text: Example USB endpoint 1 mouse-class device demonstrating the slave controller with HID report transactions.
opencores/EP1Mouse.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_conf_space.locked_text: PCI configuration space holding Type 0 header registers (Vendor/Device ID, command/status, BARs, interrupt config) for host enumeration.
opencores/pci_conf_space.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_spoci_ctrl.locked_text: PCI Special Configuration Interface controller for optional power-management and serial-EEPROM-loaded configuration values.
opencores/pci_spoci_ctrl.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_rst_int.locked_text: Internal PCI reset synchroniser bringing the asynchronous PCI RST# pin into the local clock domain.
opencores/pci_rst_int.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_cur_out_reg.locked_text: Output register stage for PCI current-cycle bus signals (FRAME#, IRDY#, AD parity) feeding the I/O pads.
opencores/pci_cur_out_reg.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_frame_crit.locked_text: Critical-path variant of the PCI FRAME# signal generator with synthesis-friendly placement for timing closure.
opencores/pci_frame_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_frame_en_crit.locked_text: Critical-path enable logic gating the FRAME# output driver during master cycle initiation.
opencores/pci_frame_en_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_irdy_out_crit.locked_text: Critical-path IRDY# output driver indicating master ready state on the PCI bus.
opencores/pci_irdy_out_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_mas_ad_en_crit.locked_text: Critical-path enable for the master-side AD[31:0] bus drivers during address and data phases.
opencores/pci_mas_ad_en_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_mas_ad_load_crit.locked_text: Critical-path load logic capturing master-side AD bus values for outgoing transactions.
opencores/pci_mas_ad_load_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_perr_en_crit.locked_text: Critical-path enable for the PERR# (parity error) output driver on detected data-phase parity mismatches.
opencores/pci_perr_en_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_serr_en_crit.locked_text: Critical-path enable for the SERR# (system error) open-drain output indicating address-phase or special-cycle errors.
opencores/pci_serr_en_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_target32_devs_crit.locked_text: Critical-path target-side DEVSEL# generator asserting on positive address decode within the configured BAR ranges.
opencores/pci_target32_devs_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_target32_stop_crit.locked_text: Critical-path target-side STOP# generator signalling target abort, retry, or disconnect to the master.
opencores/pci_target32_stop_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/pci_target32_trdy_crit.locked_text: Critical-path target-side TRDY# generator indicating target-ready state for data-phase completion.
opencores/pci_target32_trdy_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/USBSlaveControlBI.locked_text: Backend interface module bridging the USB slave controller to the user-facing FIFO and register interface.
opencores/USBSlaveControlBI.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest follow-up; LLM tripping R10-R14 validator on these final 5.

opencores/pci_cbe_en_crit.locked_text: Critical-path enable for the PCI C/BE# (command/byte-enable) bus drivers during master cycles.
opencores/pci_cbe_en_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest follow-up; LLM tripping R10-R14 validator on these final 5.

opencores/pci_frame_load_crit.locked_text: Critical-path FRAME# load-register driving the next bus-cycle FRAME# state for master transactions.
opencores/pci_frame_load_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest follow-up; LLM tripping R10-R14 validator on these final 5.

opencores/pci_serr_crit.locked_text: Critical-path SERR# generator asserting on detected address-parity or special-cycle error conditions.
opencores/pci_serr_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest follow-up; LLM tripping R10-R14 validator on these final 5.

opencores/pci_target32_interface.locked_text: Top-level 32-bit PCI target interface aggregating DEVSEL#, TRDY#, STOP#, and AD-bus drivers for slave-side transactions.
opencores/pci_target32_interface.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest follow-up; LLM tripping R10-R14 validator on these final 5.

opencores/USBHostControlBI.locked_text: Backend interface module bridging the USB host controller to the user-facing FIFO and register interface.
opencores/USBHostControlBI.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest second follow-up.

opencores/lineControlUpdate.locked_text: Updates USB line control state including bus speed sensing and D+/D- pull-up enable signalling.
opencores/lineControlUpdate.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest second follow-up.

opencores/pci_mas_ch_state_crit.locked_text: Critical-path PCI master channel state register tracking ongoing transaction phase for downstream bus-signal generation.
opencores/pci_mas_ch_state_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest second follow-up.

opencores/pci_master32_sm.locked_text: Top-level 32-bit PCI master state machine sequencing address phase, data phases, and turn-around for outgoing transactions.
opencores/pci_master32_sm.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest second follow-up.

opencores/Clk_ctrl.locked_text: Generates and distributes multiple clock signals at different frequencies for the MAC and PHY subsystems.
opencores/Clk_ctrl.notes: hand-written; LLM produced this on prior runs but tripped validator on this one — model variance, locking to prevent flapping.

opencores/pci_target32_sm.locked_text: Top-level 32-bit PCI target state machine sequencing address decode, latency timeouts, and data-phase progress for slave-side transactions.
opencores/pci_target32_sm.notes: hand-written; companion to pci_master32_sm. LLM tripping validator on this state-machine top.

opencores/writeUSBWireData.locked_text: Drives the USB D+/D- wire signals at NRZI bit timing during outgoing packet transmission from the serial interface engine.
opencores/writeUSBWireData.notes: hand-written; final straggler in RTL-P3.321/322/323/324 batch ingest.

opencores/amber.locked_text: ARMv2-compatible 32-bit RISC processor with Wishbone bus (Conor Santifort 2010+). Two pipeline variants: a23 (3-stage) and a25 (5-stage), shared register file, MMU, caches.
opencores/amber.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

opencores/copyblaze.locked_text: PicoBlaze-compatible 8-bit microcontroller in VHDL-2008 (Adrien Trousson 2015+). Compact softcore with peripheral ecosystem (UART, GPIO) over Wishbone.
opencores/copyblaze.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

opencores/ethernet_tri_mode.locked_text: Tri-mode 10/100/1000 Mbps Ethernet MAC with GMII PHY interface (Jon Gao 2001+). 32-bit OpenCores streaming user bus, Wishbone-style CSR access, includes RMON statistics.
opencores/ethernet_tri_mode.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

opencores/ethmac.locked_text: 10/100 Mbps Ethernet MAC with MII PHY interface and Wishbone host bus (Igor Mohor + Olof Kindgren 2001-2002). Includes flow control, MIIM management, and optional traffic coprocessor.
opencores/ethmac.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

opencores/pci.locked_text: Bidirectional 32-bit PCI ↔ Wishbone bridge supporting both initiator and target operation (Tadej Markovic + Miha Dolenc 2002+).
opencores/pci.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

opencores/usbhostslave.locked_text: USB 1.1 host and slave controller in one package, with serial interface engine, host control state machine, and slave endpoint logic. Wishbone bus interface.
opencores/usbhostslave.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

opencores/xge_mac.locked_text: 10 Gigabit Ethernet MAC with XGMII PHY interface and Wishbone bus (A. Tanguay 2008). Packet-level pkt_tx/pkt_rx user interface, includes generic FIFOs and clock-domain-crossing utilities.
opencores/xge_mac.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

alex-forencich/verilog-ethernet.locked_text: Verilog Ethernet MAC + IP/UDP stack supporting 1G/10G/25G/40G/100G with both Intel and Xilinx primitives (Alex Forencich). Deprecated upstream — author moved active development to fpganinja/taxi (CERN-OHL-S-2.0); MIT-licensed verilog-ethernet remains freely available here.
alex-forencich/verilog-ethernet.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.
